subcodes.first_line: O Firaydun, thy namesake hath been rendered obscure, his name but a mere utterance upon the tongues and lips of men, for his sovereignty did encompass the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فریدون همنامت گمنام شد نامش لفظی است در السن و افواه زیرا سلطنتش جهانبانی
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Eastern values; culture, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
